20.dv: a primitive root; also  denominative (from H2779 (חֹרֶף))

20.kj: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.

21.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God

21.gl: an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way

21.gl: guilt; by implication, a fault; also a sin-offering
